     The Numbers Business Report

Warcraft (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $47,365,290Details
International Box Office $391,534,534
Worldwide Box Office $438,899,824
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,965,453
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $12,533,123
Total $17,498,576
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The peaceful realm of Azeroth stands on the brink of war as its civilization faces a fearsome race of invaders: Orc warriors fleeing their dying home to colonize another. As a portal opens to connect the two worlds, one army faces destruction and the other faces extinction. From opposing sides, two heroes are set on a collision course that will decide the fate of their family, their people and their home. So begins a spectacular saga of power and sacrifice in which war has many faces, and everyone fights for something.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$24,166,110 (51.0% of total gross)
Legs:1.96 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:10.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$160,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,400 opening theaters/3,406 max. theaters, 2.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $65,490,042

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 10th, 2016 (Wide) by Universal
June 10th, 2016 (IMAX) by Universal
International Releases: May 25th, 2016 (Wide) (France)
May 25th, 2016 (Wide) (Philippines)
May 25th, 2016 (Wide) (Switzerland)
May 26th, 2016 (Wide) (Denmark)
May 26th, 2016 (Wide) (Germany)
Video Release: September 13th, 2016 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for extended sequences of intense fantasy violence.
(Rating bulletin 2400 (Cert #49858), 11/18/2015)
Running Time: 123 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Invented Language, Motion Capture Performance, Visual Effects
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Social setting: Sword & Sorcerer
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Game
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures, Legendary Pictures, Blizzard Entertainment, Atlas Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The peaceful realm of Azeroth stands on the brink of war as its civilization faces a fearsome race of invaders: Orc warriors fleeing their dying home to colonize another. As a portal opens to connect the two worlds, one army faces destruction and the other faces extinction. From opposing sides, two heroes are set on a collision course that will decide the fate of their family, their people and their home. So begins a spectacular saga of power and sacrifice in which war has many faces, and everyone fights for something.
